title: Little Legend's Treasure Hunt
description: Help Little Legend find the hidden treasure!

data.narrative: Little Legend wakes up to sunshine streaming through the window. Today is a special day – a treasure hunt on Barbados! A friendly parrot named Polly flies to the window with a golden map in her beak.
Little Legend runs to the beautiful sandy beach. The ocean sparkles like diamonds! There's a friendly crab digging in the sand and a big palm tree with coconuts.
Polly leads Little Legend into a magical jungle full of colorful flowers and singing birds. A trail of shiny stones leads deeper into the forest!
The crab is so happy Little Legend helped! He does a little sideways dance and points a claw toward a shiny spot in the sand. Could it be the treasure?

🎉 AMAZING! Little Legend found the treasure! But the real treasure wasn't gold – it was a beautiful shell that plays Caribbean music when you hold it to your ear! "Wah gwan, little legend!" says Polly. "You're a true island explorer!"
